message:
XNIW/iOSMerchandiseControl is not connected to a CodeRabbit organization you can access, so this review will use the free CLI allowance.

If you expected an org plan here, check your signed-in account with coderabbit auth status, or install CodeRabbit for XNIW/iOSMerchandiseControl at https://app.coderabbit.ai

metadata.policyGuidance: You've used all free CLI reviews for now. CodeRabbit can't apply an organization plan until this repository is connected to CodeRabbit. Add and push a Git remote if needed. Install CodeRabbit for this repository in the [CodeRabbit dashboard](https://app.coderabbit.ai), or wait for the free limit to reset.
